title: calonyction aculeatum var. lobatum
intro: Calonyction aculeatum var. lobatum, also known as the Lobed Calonyction, is a variant of the Calonyction aculeatum plant, a species of vine native to tropical Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and analgesic properties. The health benefits of Calonyction aculeatum var. lobatum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various skin conditions such as eczema and wounds. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically used to make teas, infusions, and poultices, which are used to treat a range of health issues.
